projectDescription: A distributed node orchestration and health monitoring platform with a FastAPI control plane, signed-webhook node agents, and a Discord ChatOps interface for deploying, managing, and rolling back Nix-flake-defined services across multiple hosts.
keyFeatures: Distributed node orchestration with a central FastAPI control plane
HMAC-signed webhook protocol for secure agent-to-control-plane communication
Health-aware deployment with automatic service status tracking (healthy/dead/failed)
Nix flake manifest-driven deployments with inspect, deploy, teardown, and rollback commands
Discord ChatOps integration for deploying and monitoring infrastructure from a chat interface
Async log streaming from agents to the control plane via batched webhooks
Operation audit log with triggered-by attribution for all infrastructure changes
Automatic node heartbeat monitoring with configurable fail thresholds
publicApiSurface: POST /webhook — HMAC-signed event ingestion (node_status, status, logs_batch)
POST /nodes — Register or update an infrastructure node
GET /nodes — List all registered nodes with status
POST /services — Declare a service on a node with Nix flake reference
GET /services — List all services and their current status
POST /deploy — Deploy a specific service to a node
POST /deploy-all — Bulk deploy all declared services
POST /command — Run a manifest-defined command for a service
POST /teardown — Decommission a service from its node
POST /rollback — Roll back a service to a target version
GET /operations/audit — View audit log with attribution
POST /command (agent) — Execute a Nix flake command on the agent
POST /inspect (agent) — Inspect a Nix flake manifest
